description: Set the coordinate system. These settings affect how extruded object coordinates (u,v,n) map to global coordinates ( \(x,y,z\) ). Object coordinate (n) and global coordinate ( \(z\) ) are 3D only.

6.0.description: Set the coordinate system. These settings affect how extruded object coordinates (u,v,n) map to global coordinates (\(x,y,z\)).

keywords.name: normal-axis
keywords.description: Set the normal axis v (3D vector). This is the direction of extrusion (perpendicular to 2D local \(x\),\(y\)).

keywords.name: origin
keywords.description: Set the origin of the extrusion transformation v (3D vector). When extruded, the 2D extrusion coordinate (0,0) is mapped to (\(x,y,z\)) before being rotated into the u,v,n coordinate system.

keywords.name: u-axis
keywords.description: Set the u-axis (3D vector v). This axis is the direction of \(x\) from the 2D coordinate system when the model is extruded into 3D.

keywords.name: v-axis
keywords.description: Sets the v-axis (3D vector v). This axis is the direction of \(y\) from the 2D coordinate system when the model is extruded into 3D.

7.0.description: Set the coordinate system. These settings affect how extruded object coordinates (u,v,n) map to global coordinates (\(x,y,z\)).

keywords.name: normal-axis
keywords.description: Set the normal axis v (3D vector). This is the direction of extrusion (perpendicular to 2D local \(x\), \(y\)).

keywords.name: origin
keywords.description: Set the origin of the extrusion transformation v (3D vector). When extruded, the 2D extrusion coordinate (0,0) is mapped to (\(x,y,z\)) before being rotated into the u,v,n coordinate system.

keywords.name: u-axis
keywords.description: Set the u-axis (3D vector v). This axis is the direction of \(x\) from the 2D coordinate system when the model is extruded into 3D.

keywords.name: v-axis
keywords.description: Sets the v-axis (3D vector v). This axis is the direction of \(y\) from the 2D coordinate system when the model is extruded into 3D.

keywords.name: normal-axis
keywords.description: Set the normal axis v (3D vector). This is the direction of extrusion (perpendicular to 2D local \(x\) , \(y\) ).

keywords.name: origin
keywords.description: Set the origin of the extrusion transformation v (2D or 3D vector). If extruded ( FLAC3D ), the 2D extrusion coordinate (0,0) is mapped to ( \(x,y,z\) ) before being rotated into the u,v,n coordinate system.

keywords.name: u-axis
keywords.description: Set the u-axis (2D or 3D vector v ). This axis is the direction of \(x\) from the 2D coordinate system if the model is extruded into 3D (3D only).

keywords.name: v-axis
keywords.description: Sets the v-axis (2D or 3D vector v ). This axis is the direction of \(y\) from the 2D coordinate system if the model is extruded into 3D (3D only).
